title: Moving activity and files from one board to another
excerpt: Hello -  we need help with creating a workflow that moves files and activity from one board to another in the CRM. For example, when a contact goes from the lead board to the deal board, the activity associated with that…

posts.author: dafinney12 (David Finney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - we need help with creating a workflow that moves files and activity from one board to another in the CRM. For example, when a contact goes from the lead board to the deal board, the activity associated with that lead needs to be added to the new deal on a different board. Can anyone help with that?

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, we can definitely help you set up that kind of workflow within your Monday CRM. What you’re describing—automatically moving files and activity from one board to another when a contact progresses—is something we’ve implemented for many clients, and there are a few ways to approach it depending on your specific needs and setup.

If you’d like, we can jump on a quick call to better understand your current setup and propose the best solution—whether using native automations, connected boards, or more advanced integrations with tools like Make.com.

Looking forward to helping you streamline your CRM.
Cinapsys - 2024 Services Partner of the year - LATAM
info@cinapsys.com

posts.author: deligence (Sanjay Kumar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear @dafinney12,

Thanks for posting your requirement.

We’ve built similar automation workflows using Make and have strong experience with Monday.com’s API and structure.

We can help you create a seamless workflow that automatically transfers all relevant data — including files, updates, and communication history — from the Lead board to the Deal board as soon as a status changes. This will ensure no manual effort is needed, and your team can stay focused on closing deals.

Would you be open to a quick call or chat so I can understand your current setup and show how we can implement this smoothly?

We are Monday.com Authorized Partner and we have done a lot of automation work using Make, Zapier, and n8n.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
Sanjay Kumar Aggarwal

Deligence Technologies

Generative AI Development Services | Deligence Technologies

Deligence an leading Generative AI Development Services. Our experts specialize in custom AI App Development, AI Chatbot, ChatGPT Integration.
